subject: Review all assets for clarity and facts
description:
Act as Aristotle reviewer. Check all 4 assets for:
1. Logical errors
2. Factual accuracy
3. AI giveaways (remove bullet points, dashes, patterns)
4. Content that can be said more crisply
5. Hook effectiveness (do they compel reading?)

Provide specific edit recommendations.
activeForm: Reviewing assets for clarity and factual accuracy
